---
id: patch-channels-channel-id-marker-rules-marker-rule-id
title: 'Patch /channels/{channelId}/markerRules/{markerRuleId}'
description: 'Update a marker rule.'
sidebar_label: 'Patch /channels/{channelId}/markerRules/{markerRuleId}'
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: 'patch api-method'
info_path: ads/api/reference/optiview-ads-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from '@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint';
import ParamsDetails from '@theme/ParamsDetails';
import RequestSchema from '@theme/RequestSchema';
import StatusCodes from '@theme/StatusCodes';
import OperationTabs from '@theme/OperationTabs';
import TabItem from '@theme/TabItem';
import Heading from '@theme/Heading';
import Translate from '@docusaurus/Translate';

<Heading as={'h1'} className={'openapi__heading'} children={'Patch /channels/{channelId}/markerRules/{markerRuleId}'}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={'patch'} path={'/api/v1/channels/{channelId}/markerRules/{markerRuleId}'} context={'endpoint'}></MethodEndpoint>

Update a marker rule.

<Heading id={'request'} as={'h2'} className={'openapi-tabs__heading'}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    { description: 'Identifier of the channel.', in: 'path', name: 'channelId', required: true, schema: { type: 'string' } },
    { description: 'Identifier of the marker rule.', in: 'path', name: 'markerRuleId', required: true, schema: { type: 'string' } },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={'Body'}
  body={{
    content: {
      'application/json': {
        schema: {
          properties: {
            assetParameters: {
              additionalProperties: { type: 'string' },
              description: 'Optional asset parameters merged into the template assets when a break is scheduled from this rule, as a string map.',
              type: 'object',
            },
            conditions: {
              additionalProperties: { type: 'string' },
              description: 'Key-value conditions a detected marker must satisfy for this rule to match.',
              type: 'object',
            },
            enabled: { default: true, description: 'Whether this rule is evaluated during break detection. Defaults to true.', type: 'boolean' },
            streamType: { description: 'Stream type a marker rule applies to. Currently only `HLS`.', enum: ['HLS'], type: 'string' },
            templateId: { description: 'Identifier of the template applied when this rule matches.', minLength: 1, type: 'string' },
            type: {
              description: 'HLS marker type to match: `CUE` (`EXT-X-CUE` tags) or `DATERANGE` (`EXT-X-DATERANGE` tags).',
              enum: ['CUE', 'DATERANGE'],
              type: 'string',
            },
          },
          type: 'object',
        },
      },
    },
    required: true,
  }}
></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  responses={{
    '200': {
      content: {
        'application/json': {
          schema: {
            additionalProperties: false,
            properties: {
              assetParameters: {
                additionalProperties: { type: 'string' },
                description: 'Optional asset parameters merged into the template assets when a break is scheduled from this rule, as a string map.',
                type: 'object',
              },
              conditions: {
                additionalProperties: { type: 'string' },
                description: 'Key-value conditions a detected marker must satisfy for this rule to match.',
                type: 'object',
              },
              createdAt: { description: 'Timestamp when the marker rule was created, as an ISO 8601 datetime string.', type: 'string' },
              enabled: { description: 'Whether this rule is evaluated during break detection.', type: 'boolean' },
              id: { description: 'Unique marker rule identifier within the channel.', type: 'string' },
              streamType: { description: 'Stream type a marker rule applies to. Currently only `HLS`.', enum: ['HLS'], type: 'string' },
              templateId: { description: 'Identifier of the template applied when this rule matches.', type: 'string' },
              type: {
                description: 'HLS marker type to match: `CUE` (`EXT-X-CUE` tags) or `DATERANGE` (`EXT-X-DATERANGE` tags).',
                enum: ['CUE', 'DATERANGE'],
                type: 'string',
              },
            },
            required: ['id', 'streamType', 'type', 'conditions', 'templateId', 'enabled', 'createdAt'],
            type: 'object',
          },
        },
      },
      description: 'Default Response',
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
